title: lib
description: This directory contains helper classes that implement various functionalities required for processing input data in the Hadoop MapReduce framework. These classes collaborate to provide a flexible and extensible framework for processing different types of input data. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a high-level abstraction for common data processing tasks, allowing developers to focus on the specific requirements of their MapReduce jobs.
